title: Valid Parentheses
description: Given a non-empty string s containing only the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', return True if the brackets are correctly opened and closed in the right order (i.e., string is well-formatted), False otherwise. For instance: Input='{()[]}', Output=True
inputFormat: A non-empty non-empty string s containing only the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']'
outputFormat: Boolean: True if s is well-formatted, otherwise False
